en: The sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel (for he was the firstborn, but because he defiled his father's couch, his birthright was given to the sons of Joseph the son of Israel, so that he could not be enrolled as the oldest son;
zh: 以色列的長子流本的兒子如下 ：

en: though Judah became strong among his brothers and a chief came from him, yet the birthright belonged to Joseph),
the sons of Reuben, the firstborn of Israel: Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.
zh: 以色列的長子流本的兒子是哈諾、法路、希斯倫和迦米。

en: The sons of Joel: Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son,
zh: 約珥的子孫如下：約珥的兒子是示瑪雅，示瑪雅的兒子是歌革，歌革的兒子是示每，

en: Micah his son, Reaiah his son, Baal his son,
zh: 示每的兒子是米迦，米迦的兒子是利．亞雅，利．亞雅的兒子是巴力，

en: Beerah his son, whom Tiglath-pileser king of Assyria carried away into exile; he was a chief of the Reubenites.
zh: 巴力的兒子是備．拉；備．拉被亞述王提革拉．毘尼色擄去，他是流本支派的首領。

en: And his kinsmen by their clans, when the genealogy of their generations was recorded: the chief, Jeiel, and Zechariah,
zh: 他的兄弟按著家族歷代的譜系記載作首領的，是耶利、撒迦利雅和比拉。

en: and Bela the son of Azaz, son of Shema, son of Joel, who lived in Aroer, as far as Nebo and Baal-meon.
zh: 比拉是亞撒的兒子，亞撒是示瑪的兒子，示瑪是約珥的兒子。約珥住在亞羅珥，遠至尼波和巴力．免。

en: He also lived to the east as far as the entrance of the desert this side of the Euphrates, because their livestock had multiplied in the land of Gilead.
zh: 他也向東面遷居，直到幼發拉底河這邊曠野的邊緣，因為他們在基列地的牲畜增多起來。

en: And in the days of Saul they waged war against the Hagrites, who fell into their hand. And they lived in their tents throughout all the region east of Gilead.
zh: 掃羅在位的日子，他們與夏甲人作戰；夏甲人敗在他們手下，他們就在基列東面的全境，住在夏甲人的帳棚裡。

en: The sons of Gad lived over against them in the land of Bashan as far as Salecah:
zh: 迦得的子孫在流本支派的對面，住在巴珊地，直到撒迦。

en: Joel the chief, Shapham the second, Janai, and Shaphat in Bashan.
zh: 住在巴珊的有族長約珥，副族長沙番，還有雅乃和沙法。

en: And their kinsmen according to their fathers' houses: Michael, Meshullam, Sheba, Jorai, Jacan, Zia and Eber, seven.
zh: 他們同家族的兄弟是米迦勒、米書蘭、示巴、約賴、雅干、細亞和希伯，共七人。

en: These were the sons of Abihail the son of Huri, son of Jaroah, son of Gilead, son of Michael, son of Je-shishai, son of Jahdo, son of Buz.
zh: 以上這些人都是亞比孩的兒子。亞比孩是戶利的兒子，戶利是耶羅亞的兒子，耶羅亞是基列的兒子，基列是米迦勒的兒子，米迦勒是耶示篩的兒子，耶示篩是耶哈多的兒子，耶哈多是布斯的兒子；

en: Ahi the son of Abdiel, son of Guni, was chief in their fathers' houses,
zh: 還有古尼的孫子、押比疊的兒子亞希，是他們家族的首領。

en: and they lived in Gilead, in Bashan and in its towns, and in all the pasturelands of Sharon to their limits.
zh: 他們住在基列、巴珊和屬於巴珊的村莊，以及沙崙的整個草場，直到四周的邊緣。

en: All of these were recorded in genealogies in the days of Jotham king of Judah, and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.
zh: 以上所有這些人，在猶大王約坦和以色列王耶羅波安在位的日子，都記載在家譜上。

en: The Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh had valiant men who carried shield and sword, and drew the bow, expert in war, 44,760, able to go to war.
zh: 流本支派、迦得支派和瑪拿西半個支派的人，都是勇士；他們拿盾牌和刀劍，能拉弓射箭，又能出征善戰的，共有四萬四千七百六十人。

en: They waged war against the Hagrites, Jetur, Naphish, and Nodab.
zh: 他們與夏甲人、伊突人、拿非施人和挪答人作戰。

en: And when they prevailed over them, the Hagrites and all who were with them were given into their hands, for they cried out to God in the battle, and he granted their urgent plea because they trusted in him.
zh: 他們得 神的幫助對抗敵人，夏甲人和所有與夏甲人聯盟的人，都交在他們手中，因為他們在作戰的時候向 神呼求； 神應允了他們，因為他們倚靠他。

en: They carried off their livestock: 50,000 of their camels, 250,000 sheep, 2,000 donkeys, and 100,000 men alive.
zh: 他們又擄掠了敵人的牲畜：駱駝五萬、羊二十五萬、驢二千，以及人口十萬。

en: For many fell, because the war was of God. And they lived in their place until the exile.
zh: 因為這場戰爭是出於 神，所以敵人被殺的很多；他們就佔領了敵人的地方，直到被擄的時候。

en: The members of the half-tribe of Manasseh lived in the land. They were very numerous from Bashan to Baal-hermon, Senir, and Mount Hermon.
zh: 瑪拿西半個支派的人住在那地，從巴珊直到巴力．黑門、示尼珥和黑門山，他們人數眾多。

en: These were the heads of their fathers' houses: Epher, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremiah, Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty warriors, famous men, heads of their fathers' houses.
zh: 以下這些人是他們各家族的族長：以弗、以示、以列、亞斯列、耶利米、何達威雅和雅疊；他們都是英勇的戰士，著名的人物，也是各家族的族長。

en: But they broke faith with the God of their fathers, and whored after the gods of the peoples of the land, whom God had destroyed before them.
zh: 他們背棄了他們列祖的 神，隨從當地民族的神行邪淫； 神曾從他們面前消滅了這些民族。

en: So the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, the spirit of Tiglath-pileser king of Assyria, and he took them into exile, namely, the Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh, and brought them to Halah, Habor, Hara, and the river Gozan, to this day.
zh: 因此，以色列的 神激動了亞述王普勒的心，就是亞述王提革拉．毘尼色的心，他就把流本支派、迦得支派和瑪拿西半個支派的人擄到哈臘、哈博和哈拉，以及歌散河邊，他們的後裔直到今日還在那裡。
